items.example: They had to abandon the sinking ship.
items.exampleTranslation: 他们不得不放弃正在下沉的船。

items.definition: v. 吸收；吸引（注意力）；理解
items.example: Plants absorb carbon dioxide from the air.
items.exampleTranslation: 植物从空气中吸收二氧化碳。

items.example: She accompanied her mother to the hospital.
items.exampleTranslation: 她陪母亲去了医院。

items.example: If we work together, we can accomplish anything.
items.exampleTranslation: 如果我们齐心协力，我们可以完成任何事情。

items.definition: v. 承认；确认收到；致谢
items.example: He acknowledged his mistake and apologized.
items.exampleTranslation: 他承认了自己的错误并道歉。

items.example: Animals must adapt to changes in their environment.
items.exampleTranslation: 动物必须适应环境的变化。

items.example: The organization advocates for equal rights for all.
items.exampleTranslation: 该组织倡导人人享有平等权利。

items.example: The government allocated funds for the new project.
items.exampleTranslation: 政府为新项目拨出了资金。

items.definition: v. 预期；期望；预先准备
items.example: We anticipate that demand will increase next year.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们预计明年的需求会增加。

items.example: I really appreciate your help with the project.
items.exampleTranslation: 我非常感激你在这个项目上的帮助。

items.definition: v. 接近；着手处理 n. 方法；途径
items.example: We need to approach this problem from a different angle.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们需要从不同的角度来处理这个问题。

items.example: Teachers need to assess students' progress regularly.
items.exampleTranslation: 教师需要定期评估学生的进步。

items.example: People often associate success with hard work.
items.exampleTranslation: 人们常常把成功和努力联系在一起。

items.example: Don't assume that everyone agrees with you.
items.exampleTranslation: 不要假设每个人都同意你。

items.definition: v. 把…归因于 n. 属性；特征
items.example: She attributes her success to hard work and perseverance.
items.exampleTranslation: 她把成功归因于努力和毅力。

items.definition: n. 通道；进入权；访问 v. 访问；获取
items.example: Students have free access to the library's online resources.
items.exampleTranslation: 学生可以免费访问图书馆的在线资源。

items.example: The university provides accommodation for international students.
items.exampleTranslation: 大学为国际学生提供住宿。

items.example: Winning the competition was a great achievement for the team.
items.exampleTranslation: 赢得比赛对团队来说是一个巨大的成就。

items.example: Her ambition is to become a successful doctor.
items.exampleTranslation: 她的抱负是成为一名成功的医生。

items.example: The restaurant has a warm and welcoming atmosphere.
items.exampleTranslation: 这家餐厅有一种温暖而热情的氛围。

items.example: Under no circumstances should you give up your dream.
items.exampleTranslation: 在任何情况下都不要放弃你的梦想。

items.example: Climate change will have serious consequences for future generations.
items.exampleTranslation: 气候变化将对后代产生严重的后果。

items.example: Their contribution to the project was highly valued.
items.exampleTranslation: 他们对项目的贡献受到了高度评价。

items.example: The policy has caused great controversy among the public.
items.exampleTranslation: 这项政策在公众中引起了巨大争议。

items.example: Cultural diversity is one of the city's greatest strengths.
items.exampleTranslation: 文化多样性是这座城市最大的优势之一。

items.example: The country's economy has been growing steadily.
items.exampleTranslation: 该国的经济一直在稳步增长。

items.example: We must protect the environment for future generations.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们必须为后代保护环境。

items.example: There is strong evidence that exercise improves mental health.
items.exampleTranslation: 有强有力的证据表明运动能改善心理健康。

items.example: College is a great opportunity to discover your interests.
items.exampleTranslation: 大学是发现你兴趣的绝佳机会。

items.example: Global warming is a complex phenomenon that affects everyone.
items.exampleTranslation: 全球变暖是一个影响每个人的复杂现象。

items.example: The region has abundant natural resources.
items.exampleTranslation: 该地区拥有丰富的自然资源。

items.definition: adj. 可进入的；易接近的；可理解的
items.example: The museum is accessible to people with disabilities.
items.exampleTranslation: 博物馆对残障人士是无障碍的。

items.definition: adj. 足够的；充分的；适当的
items.example: Make sure you get adequate sleep before the exam.
items.exampleTranslation: 确保考试前有充足的睡眠。

items.definition: adj. 可替代的 n. 替代方案
items.example: We need to find alternative sources of energy.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们需要找到替代能源。

items.example: Please wear appropriate clothing for the interview.
items.exampleTranslation: 面试时请穿着得体的服装。

items.definition: adj. 人造的；人工的；虚假的
items.example: Artificial intelligence is transforming many industries.
items.exampleTranslation: 人工智能正在改变许多行业。

items.example: Regular exercise is beneficial to both body and mind.
items.exampleTranslation: 定期锻炼对身心都有益。

items.definition: adj. 全面的；综合的；详尽的
items.example: The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the issue.
items.exampleTranslation: 该报告对这一问题进行了全面的分析。

items.definition: adj. 有意识的；清醒的；故意的
items.example: We should be more conscious of our environmental impact.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们应该更加注意我们对环境的影响。

items.definition: adj. 有争议的；引起争论的
items.example: The controversial policy was debated for months.
items.exampleTranslation: 这项有争议的政策被辩论了数月。

items.example: The new system is much more efficient than the old one.
items.exampleTranslation: 新系统比旧系统高效得多。

items.definition: adj. 必要的；本质的；基本的
items.example: Water is essential for all living things.
items.exampleTranslation: 水对所有生物都是必不可少的。

items.definition: adj. 灵活的；柔韧的；可变通的
items.example: The company offers flexible working hours to its employees.
items.exampleTranslation: 公司为员工提供灵活的工作时间。

items.definition: adj. 不可避免的；必然发生的
items.example: Change is inevitable in every aspect of life.
items.exampleTranslation: 变化在生活的方方面面都是不可避免的。

items.definition: adj. 重要的；显著的；有意义的
items.example: There has been a significant increase in online learning.
items.exampleTranslation: 在线学习有了显著的增长。

items.definition: adv. 绝对地；完全地；毫无疑问地
items.example: You are absolutely right about that.
items.exampleTranslation: 关于那件事你完全正确。

items.example: The situation has changed, and we must act accordingly.
items.exampleTranslation: 情况已经变了，我们必须相应地采取行动。

items.example: The project will take approximately six months to complete.
items.exampleTranslation: 这个项目大约需要六个月才能完成。

items.example: He didn't study for the exam; consequently, he failed.
items.exampleTranslation: 他没有为考试复习，因此他没通过。

items.example: I deliberately avoided mentioning the topic at dinner.
items.exampleTranslation: 我故意避免在晚餐时提及那个话题。

items.example: After many attempts, she eventually passed the driving test.
items.exampleTranslation: 经过多次尝试，她最终通过了驾驶考试。

items.example: This word frequently appears in CET-4 exams.
items.exampleTranslation: 这个词在四级考试中频繁出现。

items.example: Her health gradually improved after the treatment.
items.exampleTranslation: 治疗后，她的健康状况逐渐好转。

items.definition: adv. 不可避免地；必然地
items.example: Technological advances inevitably change the way we work.
items.exampleTranslation: 技术进步不可避免地改变了我们的工作方式。

items.example: The exam was relatively easy compared to last year's.
items.exampleTranslation: 与去年相比，这次考试相对容易。

items.definition: phr. 解释；说明（原因）；占（比例）
items.example: Online sales account for 30% of the company's total revenue.
items.exampleTranslation: 在线销售占公司总收入的30%。

items.example: Technology has brought about significant changes in education.
items.exampleTranslation: 技术给教育带来了重大变革。

items.definition: phr. 想出；提出（想法、方案）
items.example: We need to come up with a better solution to the problem.
items.exampleTranslation: 我们需要想出一个更好的解决方案。

items.example: Students must learn to cope with academic pressure.
items.exampleTranslation: 学生必须学会应对学业压力。

items.definition: phr. 弄清楚；弄明白；计算出
items.example: I can't figure out why he suddenly changed his mind.
items.exampleTranslation: 我搞不懂他为什么突然改变了主意。

items.example: The new policy gave rise to heated public debate.
items.exampleTranslation: 新政策引起了公众的热烈讨论。

items.example: The city is quite small in terms of population.
items.exampleTranslation: 就人口而言，这个城市相当小。

items.definition: phr. 有道理；讲得通；有意义
items.example: His explanation doesn't make any sense to me.
items.exampleTranslation: 他的解释对我来说毫无道理。

items.example: You should take advantage of every opportunity to practice English.
items.exampleTranslation: 你应该利用每一个机会来练习英语。

items.definition: phr. 结果是；证明是；出席
items.example: The interview turned out to be much easier than I expected.
items.exampleTranslation: 面试结果比我想象的容易得多。
